## Sourcing checklist (required)
- [ ] Every new node has **≥ 1 primary source** with a working `url`.
- [ ] Every new edge's `title` ends with a `Source: ...` citation.
- [ ] Any approximate / deduced claim is marked **`inferred - requires verification`**
      (and inferred edges use `"dashes": true`).
- [ ] I ran `python validate.py` locally and it printed `OK`.
- [ ] I changed only `data/*.json` (or, if I touched Python, I explain why below).
